title: Converting numbers to text
excerpt: I am looking for a solution to a formula that will return a number in the form of a text.

posts.author: Bernard (Bernard Różański)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking for a solution to a formula that will return a number in the form of a text.

posts.author: gaco.com.au (Elijah Noonan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Bernard could you please elaborate on what you are trying to achieve so we can assist?

posts.author: Bernard (Bernard Różański)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @gaco.com.au I thinking of change number (price) in invoice to words.

1234= one thousand two hundred and thirty four

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Bernard !

Welcome to the monday community!

I looked into what you are requesting, and unfortunately I do not believe it is possible to do this with monday’s formulas. Glad to hear if anybody has any ideas though.

Perhaps depending on the reason you need this we can find an alternative solution?

Let me know if I can help.

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
